'''Bont''' was a member of a group of [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] that had been stealing shipments of high tech supplies from around [[Gadrin]]. The pirates were using a landing platform hidden in [[Cularin/Legends|Cularin's]] jungles west of Gadrin. Bont was assigned with [[Kerner (pirate)|Kerner]] to keep people out of the sector near the landing platform. When a [[Speeder/Legends|speeder]] bearing a group of people looking for [[Darin]] entered the area, the pirates attempted to shoot them down. Kerner lost control and crashed early on, but Bont kept on the chase. The people in the speeder eventually shot him down, although their speeder ended up damaged and crashed.
